case_title: IN RE: PRIVATE MEDIA GROUP, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN REPLY TO DEFT'S OPPOS TO PLTF'S APPLICATION FILED BY PETITIONER PRIVATE MEDIA GROUP, INC. GAME LINK LLC,A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER PRIVATE MEDIA GROUP, INC. GAME LINK LLC,A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT BUNIMOVITZ, ILAN AN INDIVIDUAL ANDFORMER  EMPLOYEE OF PRIVATE MEDIA GROUP, INC. GAME LINK LLC DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO SHOW IRREPARABLE HARM OR LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS. THE BALANCE OF EQUITIES FAVORS DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Defendant Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yvette Davis of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP (714.754.1100) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Jahan P. Raissi of Shartsis Friese LLP (421.6500) for respondent and opposing party Ilan Bunimovitz

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is denied. Plaintiffs fail to show irreparable harm or likelihood of success on the merits. The balance of equities favors defendant. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
